{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +0.56%, Bank Nifty +0.49%, Pharma +0.98%, Realty +2.33%, Energy +0.95%, Metal +0.93%. VIX easing to 18.29. Pharma and financials leading; book is well-positioned. Focus is on protecting unrealized gains via SL trails rather than adding new exposure given deployment already at 52% with multiple winners.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1030 already breakeven+, +6.2% winner. CMP 1047.50, day low 1045.50. Trailing tighter risks self-stopout (would need SL ≥1040 to be meaningful, but that's <0.5% from CMP, fails trail-gap discipline). Holding stored SL = HOLD effectively. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Override prior MODIFY: stored SL 1030 unchanged from book (no-op MODIFY rule). +6.2% winner with bullish Q4 print, sub-1% GNPA, MOFSL Buy. SL 1030 = +4.7% locked from entry 984. Target 1110 ~5.9% upside. Let it run; do not micro-trail given trail-gap discipline (1040 SL too tight to CMP 1047.50)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge -2.3%, well above SL 119 (currently 122.44). Gold ETF as portfolio insurance against equity reversal. MACD bearish but support 121.53 holding. Let SL/target framework run."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1810.00,
      "new_target": 1850.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL already 1810 (locks +4.4%); CMP 1820.50 — SL only 0.58% below CMP, at trail-gap floor. Q4 results May 19 = binary event in ~10 trading sessions. Stored values match — emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Override: stored SL 1810 and target 1850 unchanged → HOLD per no-op rule. +5.0% winner near 52w high, Organon deal supportive. SL locks +4.4%. Q4 results May 19 is binary catalyst — within next 10 sessions, so will need to revisit exit/trim disposition closer to date but not yet within 3-session window."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 23.85 vs CMP 24.11 = SL 1.08% below CMP, at trail-gap floor. +1.9% winner. Pharma sector +0.98% today, momentum intact. Target 25.20 (~4.6% upside). Stored values fine; no-op MODIFY avoided."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 948.00,
      "new_target": 990.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL already 948 (breakeven+); position now +2.2% at CMP 964.70. Want to trail SL up given sector +3.73% and Q4 beat. Proposed new SL 948 = same as stored → no-op. Switching to HOLD; revisit if move extends."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Override MODIFY: stored SL 948 = breakeven+, target 990 unchanged → HOLD. Q4 PAT +23%, AUM Rs 5L cr milestone. Sector leader +3.73% today. Target 990 (R:R 1:1.6 from current). Will trail if reaches +4% (>982)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1790.00,

      "timeframe": "SWING",

      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Override: +1.4% winner, breakout to 52w high (CMP 1733 vs prior 52w high 1672). Q4 beat: revenue +26% YoY, dividend Rs 7.50, 500MMT cargo milestone. SL 1715 = +0.88% locked, only 1% below CMP — at trail-gap floor. Target 1790 ~3.3% upside. Hold as-is."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat -0.1%, intraday reversal from 1600 high. Q4 results ~May 8 = binary event in ~4 trading sessions, within 3-session window per binary discipline. Position size 4.6k = ~4.6% of capital, below 5% threshold, qualifies as event-trade size. SL 1510 = -2.1% downside. Tanker rates strong on Hormuz; stored thesis intact. HOLD with awareness of May 8 print."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.0% loser, intraday gap-up to 13976 fully reversed (now 13644). Bearish intraday reversal but FY26 record results, Rs 140 dividend, GST cut tailwind, JM target 16570. SL 13400 = -2.9% from entry, ~1.8% below CMP, holding above support 12711. Thesis intact; let SL framework decide. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.2% breakeven. 8.2x volume surge with +5.4% move, Q4 PAT +69% YoY, NIM expansion, ICICI 10% stake clearance. SL 202 = -3.4% from entry, ~3.4% below CMP. Target 220 (+5.3% upside). MFI sector still 'negative outlook' so SL room is needed. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.3% near breakeven, +5.18% sector day. Defence theme intact, Rs 2.54L cr orderbook. SL 4440 = -2.95% from entry, ~3% below CMP. Target 4790 (+4.7% upside). Stock made 52w low recently; cautious sizing, let SL work. HOLD."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {

      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1030 already locks +4.7%; tighter SL would breach trail-gap discipline (CMP 1047.50). Let target 1110 work."

    },

    },
    {

      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Intraday reversal but thesis intact; SL 13400 absorbs noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Volume breakout post Q4 beat; SL 202 below intraday low needs room."
    },
    {

      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Sector +5.18% day; SL 4440 sits at proper trail-gap below CMP 4577."

  "watchlist_notes": "ANANTRAJ has a pending OPEN BUY @ 506 from earlier — given ED PMLA raid overhang flagged in research (confidence modifier -0.15) and Q4 results May 11 event risk amid regulatory scrutiny, the original entry thesis is contaminated by a governance overhang I should not ignore (Rule 13). CANCELING via separate decision. BHEL, BAJAJ-AUTO, SYNGENE, LALPATHLAB, ASTERDM, EXIDEIND, CONCORDBIO (Citi target Rs 1,190 vs CMP 1198 = capped upside; bearish research), GODREJPROP, ADANIGREEN (Adani cluster concentration risk vs held ADANIPORTS), KOTAKBANK, RRKABEL, FLUOROCHEM, MANAPPURAM, CESC — all extended into late-day rallies; will reassess on next pulse if any pulls back to support with intact thesis. EXIDEIND Q4 today is binary — passing pre-event entry. ASTERDM Q4 already out (PAT +80%, merger 96.68% approved) but at 52w high — would prefer pullback entry not chase.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 52%, cash 48% (well above 20% floor). 10 holdings — diversified across HFC (PNBHOUSING), pharma (SUNPHARMA + PHARMABEES = ~6.5% capital, monitor cluster), NBFC (BAJFINANCE), banking (BANDHANBNK), auto (MARUTI), defence (HAL), services (ADANIPORTS, GESHIP), realty pending (ANANTRAJ — canceling), gold hedge (GOLDBEES). Today's action is pure position management — 8 of 10 positions at or above breakeven, total unrealized +₹7,171, realized today +₹2,156. Decision discipline: not adding new positions into a +0.56% Nifty rally where most setups are extended to 52w highs; chasing rallies into the 12:00 hour is the failure mode I want to avoid. Will reassess late-session for any tactical exits (none flagged today). Cancel ANANTRAJ pending order due to governance overhang (ED PMLA) flagged in research that should have triggered NO_ACTION at original entry."
